list.name: 更改
list.comment: 软件测试作业：学生管理系统面向对象实现

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Python 测试.test.test1.test 的 Python 测试.executor": "Run", "Python.EmployeeInformationManagementSystem.executor": "Run", "Python.a.executor": "Run", "Python.main (1).executor": "Run", "Python.main (2).executor": "Run", "Python.main.executor": "Run", "Python.python_assignment10.executor": "Run", "Python.python_assignment7.executor": "Run", "Python.temp.executor": "Run", "Python.test1.executor": "Run", "Python.test2.executor": "Run", "Python.test_login.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "com.jetbrains.python.configuration.PyActiveSdkModuleConfigurable", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
